gpt_comment: ⚠️[DIVERGENT]. Meteoblue indicates slightly higher chance of rain (0.1-0.2") compared to the baseline's 22%. Temperature and other details not stated by Meteoblue. Perhaps a good day to visit the Louvre rather than strolling in the park, unless you're a duck who loves a drizzle!
